summary: Physical world sub-phase completed successfully. Dispatched 3 specialist agents sequentially: (1) geography-builder created world-bible/geography.json with 13 locations (LOC-001 through LOC-013) spanning a northeast-to-southwest traverse from Duskhaven to the Quietus, with Pallor deterioration gradient, dual-arc location assignments, and travel rules for a 32-40 day journey; (2) culture-builder created world-bible/culture.json with 5 cultures (CUL-001 through CUL-005) — Imperial Heartland, Fae (Cerith Court/Seep), Eastern Border/Garrison Coast, Wending Communities, and Rivenmarch Freeholders — each designed to create specific romantic obstacles and fantasy atmosphere, with 12 social rules and culture-specific naming conventions; (3) history-builder created world-bible/history.json with 5 eras (ERA-001 through ERA-005) spanning from the pre-Pallor Unfinished Age through the current Thinning (YK 742), plus 5 legends and 6 historical figures supporting mystery boxes and foreshadowing hooks. All artifacts validated as well-formed JSON conforming to the world-bible schema. Zero placeholder names from the external world seed appear in any artifact — all names use canonical nameRegistry entries from story-concept.json.

routingDecisions: history-builder completed → wrote own status: complete
